Class AlbumEditDialog

java.lang.Object
com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews.AlbumEditDialog
public class AlbumEditDialog extends Object
Modal dialog for editing album metadata.

Allows the user to update the album title, release year, and genre. Because Album has no direct genre field, the entered genre is returned as part of AlbumEditDialog.Result and the caller is responsible for applying it to all songs in the album via the appropriate service.

Usage:

AlbumEditDialog.show(album).ifPresent(result -> {
    album.setTitle(result.title());
    album.setReleaseYear(result.releaseYear());
    // apply result.genre() to all songs via LibraryService
});

  • Method Details

    • show

      public static Optional<AlbumEditDialog.Result> show(Album album)
      Displays a modal edit dialog pre-populated with the given album's current metadata.
      Parameters:
      album - the album to edit; must not be null
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the AlbumEditDialog.Result if the user confirmed, or empty if the user cancelled
